calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for (petitioner) Pamela Thomas.

Mr. Hughes stated that he has submitted the petition and has nothing to add. The Court stated that the estate had not been closed for a long time and that counsel is looking for additional fees due to status hearings and travel. Mr. Hughes stated that this is his 11th appearance, that he understands there are policies, that it was a troubled estate and that he will accept the court's decision. The Court stated that counsel may have had a difficult client but that the court had to call him regarding closing the estate. Mr. Hughes stated that there are difficult cases and that at one point he wanted to withdraw as counsel but was told that the court would not look favorably on such. The Court stated that this was not a complex estate, that the matter will be taken under submission and that the fees will most likely not be granted. Mr. Hughes stated that he would like to get the order as soon as possible as there is still property to sell.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Loan And Petition For Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Loan And Petition For Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Continued To Mar-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court will issue an Order to Show Cause as to why the powers of Ms. Thomas should not be suspended, ordering Mr. Hughes to file the petition for final distribution and to explain why there was no appearance today. The Order to Show Cause will be set for March 14, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status hearing will be continued to the same date.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Macksoud. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Loan And Petition For Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Continued To Feb-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for and with Pamela Thomas. Beneficiaries Michael, Georgine & Brian Thomas also present.

Mr. Hughes reported that the parties talked prior to the hearing this morning and have resolved their difficulties, that with the agreement of the family the petition for distribution will be filed in the coming weeks for distribution of the property to all 5 of the beneficiaries. Ms. Thomas confirmed that this is the plan. The Court congratulated the family on their resolution, continued the status on filing a petition for final distribution to February 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and stated that this is the last extension that will be granted.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Loan And Petition For Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Continued To Jan-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for and with Violet Thomas.

Mr. Hughes stated that he has just been informed of Ms. Thomas' progress. Ms. Thomas stated that she got an appraisal, that she is working to obtain the loan, that she anticipates being approved and that she did not appear on 9/21/15 as she did not receive notice. Mr. Hughes stated that there is no way to close the estate unless the asset can be distributed, that the loan proceeds will be sufficient, that if the loan goes through they will be in a position to close, that the bank requests signed agreements by the heirs which will take 2-3 weeks, the lender will also need 40 days after that for processing and that once the loan is in place there should be no further obstacles. The Order to Appear was taken off calendar. The status on the loan and petition for distribution was continued to January 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Loan And Petition For Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for (petitioner) Pamela Thomas.

The Court asked about the status of the appraisal of property and the loan. Mr. Hughes reported that the last status hearing was in July, that he has not been able to contact Ms. Thomas since then, that he does not know what the status is, that Ms. Thomas performed as personal representative up to a point but has been unable to resolve the issue with the residence, that she was present at the July hearing and was anticipated at this hearing, that he has sent correspondence but no telephone calls as she works during the day and his previous experience was that she did not respond to telephone calls, that her powers were previously suspended which got her attention and this plan was made but that he is unable to suggest anything at this point. The status hearing regarding the loan and petition for distribution was continued to October 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and an Order to Appear will be issued to Pamela Thomas for that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes, for and with Pamela Lynne Thomas; Brian Thomas; Georgine Thomas.
The Order to Appear is taken off calendar by the Court.
Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes, for and with Pamela Lynne Thomas; Brian Thomas; Georgine Thomas.
In response to the Court's inquiry as to where things stand, Mr. Hughes stated that he had spoken with the siblings of the petitiner, and that there was a tentative agreement providing that the property would be appraised and a loan representing three fifths of the appraised value would be obtained. After deduction of administrative costs, the balance of the loan would be distributed to the other three siblings, and petitioner would take title to the property. The Court set a status hearing re the status of the loan and progress on a petition for distribution for September 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Order of Status Hearing and Probate Account Status Hearing were both taken off calendar by the Court.
Mr. Hughes informed the Court that as the administrator's powers had been suspended, there could be difficulty in obtaining the loan, and requested that the administrator's powers be reinstated. The Court granted the request for reinstatement of the administrator's powers, subject ot review of order.
Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jul-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for (Petitioner) Pamela Thomas. Brian Thomas (son) and Georgine Thomas (daughter) in Propria Personal.

Mr. Hughes reported that it had been Ms. Thomas's intent to borrow funds to purchase the property from her siblings but that the siblings never came to an agreement on the purchase price. Mr. Thomas stated that he wants his sister removed and someone else appointed to take over the estate, that Pamela ignores everyone and will not communicate and that they want the house sold. The Court stated that it will suspend the powers of Ms. Thomas, issue an Order to Appear and will give the parties time to file their own petitions. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Personal Representative Pamela Thomas to appear on July 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Continued To Mar-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for and with Pamela Thomas.

The Court asked Mr. Hughes if he could prepare the accounting pursuant to Probate Code 10953. Mr. Hughes stated that his Client advised him that she is prepared to go forward, that the primary asset is a house in which his Client resides in, that his Client intends to purchase the home from the Estate and asked for 60 to 90-days. Ms. Thomas stated that she can move forward and do what she needs to do to close out the Estate. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution, etc. was continued to March 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If by March 3, 2015 Counsel is not ready to proceed with Ms. Thomas, he will close out the Estate under Probate Code 10953.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-28-2014 Continued To Dec-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for Petitioner.

Mr. Hughes stated that he has had no contact with the Petitioner in three or four years, that Pamela was living in the house in 2010 and that he has sent follow up letters but has not heard back. The Court stated that the Estate needs to be closed, that perhaps one of the other Children will have to step in and that if they are unwilling to step up, Ms. Thomas will have to be removed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Pamela Hughes to appear on December 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Continued To Oct-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for Pamela Thomas.

Mr. Hughes stated that he has had no contact with his Client for approximately four years, that he is at a loss to explain to the Court where this stands, that he sent correspondence and notice of this hearing and that he received no response. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to October 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to send another notice and the Court will also send notice.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Continued To Oct-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
